opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The cramps are so violent I can't stand up, and I can't keep a drop of water down because I keep vomiting from the pain. It started this morning and it's the worst it's ever been.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain is unbearable and I can't stop being sick — I've thrown up everything, even the painkiller I took an hour ago.

symptom_narrative.onset: about six hours ago, right as my period started this morning
symptom_narrative.duration: six hours and not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: really strong cramping, like a clenching or squeezing low down
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I can't stand up straight, I'm curled up on the bed
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low in the middle of my belly, and it goes into my lower back and the tops of my thighs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started this morning
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — lying curled up maybe a tiny bit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving around, and being sick makes the cramps grip harder
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I keep vomiting and feel really nauseous, I'm exhausted and shaky, and I've had a bit of loose bowels too
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get bad cramps most months since about a year after my periods started, but never anything like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't get off the bed, I can't keep any water down, and I live on my own so there's no one here

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: paracetamol — I took one about an hour ago but threw it straight back up

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else at home right now

objective_data_offered.value: I feel really pale and clammy, and I keep breaking out in a sweat when the cramps peak
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient self-description, not a clinician observation or a device reading

objective_data_offered.value: I've been sick several times in the last few hours and can't keep even a sip of water down
